title: DF Revert
description: DiamondFire mod for customizing rank tags.
body:
## DF Revert
Simple client side mod that lets you customize your rank tags on DiamondFire. Includes preset options for the original rank tags that were implemented before the 2025 rank jam but you can create your own tag preset in the config (/dfrevert or Mod Menu).


![Customized Rank Tags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fb4989387991c053c7951d76ac5fabed84a30ac.png)


## Preset Config Screen
![Config Screen](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/593c5efa-81c9-4e21-905f-97aa14102f93)
